text:
In the first scene, I observe a classroom filled with focused individuals, engaged in learning behind glass walls. I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation, wondering what knowledge is being exchanged and how it might shape each person’s path. The environment is modern and open, echoing a spirit of collaboration, yet I also sense a barrier—am I a participant or merely an observer in their world?

In the second scene, I stand before a vibrant wall boldly marked R+D, alluding to research and development. Screens and text invite me to contemplate the interplay between innovation and humanity. Here, I feel inspired and contemplative. This space pulses with possibility and questioning, sparking within me a desire to be part of the future being imagined—one where ideas take form through inquiry and action.
